title: geophila macrocarpa
intro: Geophila macrocarpa, also known as prickly gillia or creeping gillia, is a low-growing, perennial herb belonging to the primrose family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Geophila macrocarpa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Geophila macrocarpa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
